files.content:
---
name: chatgpt-remote-image-service
description: Use when the user wants to submit reference-image generation jobs to the remote ChatGPT image HTTP service, poll task status, or get a public R2 image URL from the hosted endpoint. Trigger for requests involving remote ChatGPT 生图接口, 公网生图服务, chatgpt-image.vyibc.com, remote image generation API, taskId polling, or CLI calls to the image service.
---

# ChatGPT Remote Image Service

Use this skill for the hosted ChatGPT image queue service.

Default endpoint:

```text
https://chatgpt-image.vyibc.com
```

The service is public and does not require an Authorization header. Object names are made unique by the service: if the caller sends `uploadName=test.png`, the final R2 object will use the task id, such as `<taskId>.png`, to avoid overwriting prior images.

The service supports both modes:

- Reference-image generation: send `image` and `prompt`.
- Reference-image generation from URL: pass `--imageUrl` to the CLI, or download the URL first for raw HTTP.
- Pure prompt generation: send only `prompt`.

## Quick Start

Prefer the bundled CLI:

```bash
scripts/chatgpt-remote-image.sh \
  --imageUrl "https://resource.vyibc.com/reference.png" \
  --prompt "以参考图中的人物为准，生成一张在游泳馆的照片"
```

Local reference file:

```bash
scripts/chatgpt-remote-image.sh \
  --image /path/to/reference.png \
  --prompt "以参考图中的人物为准，生成一张在游泳馆的照片"
```

Pure prompt generation:

```bash
scripts/chatgpt-remote-image.sh \
  --prompt "生成一张未来城市夜景照片，真实摄影风格"
```

The script submits `POST /generate`, polls `GET /tasks/<taskId>`, and exits successfully only when `publicImageUrl` is returned.
At startup it also prints the current browser worker summary, including total workers, logged-in workers, workers requiring login, active workers, queued tasks, and CDP ports.

files.content:
---
name: chatgpt-remote-image-service
description: Use when the user wants to submit reference-image generation jobs to the remote ChatGPT image HTTP service, poll task status, or get a public R2 image URL from the hosted endpoint. Trigger for requests involving remote ChatGPT 生图接口, 公网生图服务, chatgpt-image.vyibc.com, remote image generation API, taskId polling, or CLI calls to the image service.
---

# ChatGPT Remote Image Service

Use this skill for the hosted ChatGPT image queue service.

Default endpoint:

```text
https://chatgpt-image.vyibc.com
```

The service is public and does not require an Authorization header. Object names are made unique by the service: if the caller sends `uploadName=test.png`, the final R2 object will use the task id, such as `<taskId>.png`, to avoid overwriting prior images.

The service supports both modes:

- Reference-image generation: send `image` and `prompt`.
- Reference-image generation from URL: pass `--imageUrl` to the CLI, or download the URL first for raw HTTP.
- Pure prompt generation: send only `prompt`.

## Quick Start

Prefer the bundled CLI:

```bash
scripts/chatgpt-remote-image.sh \
  --imageUrl "https://resource.vyibc.com/reference.png" \
  --prompt "以参考图中的人物为准，生成一张在游泳馆的照片"
```

Local reference file:

```bash
scripts/chatgpt-remote-image.sh \
  --image /path/to/reference.png \
  --prompt "以参考图中的人物为准，生成一张在游泳馆的照片"
```

Pure prompt generation:

```bash
scripts/chatgpt-remote-image.sh \
  --prompt "生成一张未来城市夜景照片，真实摄影风格"
```

The script submits `POST /generate`, polls `GET /tasks/<taskId>`, and exits successfully only when `publicImageUrl` is returned.
At startup it also prints the current browser worker summary, including total workers, logged-in workers, workers requiring login, active workers, queued tasks, and CDP ports.

parsed.summary: Node definition for ChatGPT Remote Image Service skill. Accepts prompt, reference images (file or URL), upload name, API URL, poll interval, timeout. Produces generated image public URL and task status. No upstream/downstream binding; suitable as first node in a workflow.
assumptions: No fixed upstream/downstream binding is added; Edge Handoff owns handoff semantics.
The executor type is agent-skill using hermes agent, which is appropriate for running shell-based skills.
Skill installer is trusted and provides all necessary scripts and documentation.

manual_first_node_test.description: Run as a first node in a workflow with user-provided prompt. Optionally provide reference image URL or file. Verify that the node executes the skill, polls task, and returns publicImageUrl in outputs.

inputs.prompt: Test prompt, e.g., 'Generate a test image of a sunset'
inputs.reference_image_url: Optional: URL of a reference image
inputs.upload_name: Optional: custom name for output image

manual_first_node_test.verification: Check that outputs dir contains manifest.json and that the public_image_url is accessible.
